description: Euphoria by calvin klein for women is a floral-fruity fragrance that comes in a curvy, boat-shaped flask with a shiny silver top. The main notes are rose hip, Japanese apple, green leaves, lotus, black orchid, red woods, black violet and amber. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
